notes: Works with most Hikvision IP cameras. Auth handled via Digest/Basic. Channel 1 = main, 2 = sub.
Standard Dahua snapshot endpoint. Auth handled via Digest/Basic.
Works with Axis network cameras. Auth handled via Digest/Basic.
Same endpoint as Dahua (Amcrest uses Dahua firmware). Auth handled via Digest/Basic.
Reolink cameras pass credentials as query parameters (not HTTP auth).
Foscam HD cameras pass credentials as query parameters.
Vivotek network cameras. Auth handled via Digest/Basic.
Hanwha Techwin (formerly Samsung Techwin) cameras. Auth handled via Digest/Basic.
Uniview uses ISAPI similar to Hikvision. Auth handled via Digest/Basic.
Generic ONVIF snapshot URI. May vary by manufacturer. Auth handled via Digest/Basic.
Common default for many budget IP cameras. Auth handled via Digest/Basic.
Requires ffmpeg installed. Find device name with: ffmpeg -list_devices true -f dshow -i dummy
Requires ffmpeg installed. Device is typically /dev/video0. List with: v4l2-ctl --list-devices
